QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

PLAINTIFF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.IT ISA ORDERED THAT DURING PENDENCY OF ACTION DEFENDANT ANTHONY R. BARNARD, AND HIS AGENTS, SERVANTS, EMPLOYEES, ASSIGNS AND ALL THOSE ACTING IN CONCERT OR PARTCIPATING WITH HIM, ARE ENJOINED AND RESTRAINED FROM ENGAGING IN, COMMITTING , OR PERFORMING DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY.PLAINTIFF PATRICIA E. MATHEWS MUST FILE A WRITTEN UNDERTAKING IN THE SUM OF $30,000.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS FOR DETAIL.) (PER EX PARTE ORDER OF 05/15/03)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE -THIS DISMISSAL IS REQUIRED PURSUANT TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND SHALL NOT OPERATE AS A RETRAXIT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-10-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
